title: Easy Amethyst Crafting
description: Craft any amethyst bud or cluster in the crafting table.
body:
**💎 Easy Amethyst Crafting**

Easy Amethyst Crafting makes working with amethyst easier and more accessible by adding simple crafting recipes for all amethyst growth stages. No waiting for geodes to grow — craft what you need, when you need it.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**🔨 Craftable Items**

This mod allows you to craft:

Small Amethyst Bud

Medium Amethyst Bud

Large Amethyst Bud

Amethyst Cluster

All recipes are balanced and progression-friendly, fitting naturally into vanilla survival gameplay.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**✨ Features**

Craft every amethyst growth stage

Survival-friendly and vanilla-styled recipes

No new blocks or mechanics — just convenience

Perfect for builders, redstone engineers, and decoration lovers

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**⚙️ Compatibility**

Works alongside other vanilla-style mods

No performance impact

Safe to add to existing worlds

![medium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/423371936ff78b84efce1c04b75232a44a06c872.png)

![cluster](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bcbbf3923aa3a402a3dda42cb2377d46d941d8de.png)

![all amethyst](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9c4745be66d57dcd46741df3aa4093b6d663134.jpeg)


![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD
